title: CouponRecommendation
description: The single best VALID retail coupon for a merchant/checkout (FR-SHOP-001). Provided by Module 6 to Pay and Inbox. Recommend-only: FinOS surfaces the code; the USER applies it (no auto-fill/auto-submit/money movement, Constitution IV / FR-X-003). Selection maximizes expected CAD saving subject to the coupon's own validity terms (min spend, expiry, eligibility) and lists why it beat the runners-up (Clarification Q1). Stale coupons MUST be flagged/withheld, never surfaced as live (Constitution VIII).

profile_id.description: Owning profile; cross-member reads are authZ-checked server-side (threat model IDOR).

code.description: The coupon/promo code the user enters at checkout. FinOS never submits it on the user's behalf.

expected_saving.description: Expected CAD saving in integer cents (percentage discounts computed in arbitrary precision, half-up at the final cent; foreign coupons FX-converted before display).

discount_fraction.description: Arbitrary-precision decimal-string discount factor for percentage coupons (e.g. '0.15' = 15% off); null for fixed-amount coupons. NEVER a binary float.

terms.description: Validity terms that bound 'best valid' selection — expiry and minimum spend are part of validity, not afterthoughts.

expires_on.description: Coupon expiry; an expired coupon is NOT a valid candidate.

minimum_spend.description: Minimum cart spend required for the code to be valid; below this the code is not the 'best valid' choice.

stackable.description: true only when the coupon's own terms permit stacking; FinOS never asserts a stack the merchant disallows (Clarification Q1).

reasoning.description: MUST explain why this code beat the runners-up (expected CAD saving vs validity terms) with bilingual rationale_en/rationale_fr (FR-X-006).

freshness.description: Coupon-feed freshness. Stale ⇒ the surface shows Stale/Unavailable and offers refresh; a stale coupon is never presented as live (Constitution VIII).
